//: Illustrative MCP server config — the mcp_servers[] shape a --config file carries.
//1: Each server is a REMOTE endpoint reached over Streamable HTTP (RFC 0004):
//2: agentd CONNECTS to `endpoint` and speaks JSON-RPC 2.0 over HTTP(S) — it spawns
//3: no process and runs no local code. The endpoint is TRUSTED config and is NEVER
//4: built from model- or server-controlled strings (RFC 0012).
//5: On the CLI this same shape is expressed as --mcp name=https://host/mcp (repeatable).
//6: Per-server `headers` carry auth/framing as {{secret:NAME}} references, resolved at
//7: connect time — never inlined or logged. `tags` scope the Rule-of-Two trust budget.

mcp_servers.name: inbox
mcp_servers.//: Exposes subscribable resources so reactive mode can wake on new items.
